title: KilnReborn
description: Smelts things a blast furnace and smoker can't at double speed
body:
# Kiln Reborn
This mod adds a new block that can smelt items faster just like a blast furnace. It can smelt clay into bricks, cobblestone into stone, sand into glass, etc.
![Smelting clay to bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75229dc5dec63cf4a6a1c80ecc5552e6a11182b2.png)

This mod also has recipe book and Roughly Enough Items support.
![Kiln recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5c171950d7528a79ebca8ec1ce4303e46e3c056.png)
